positive: A vibrant, highly stylized mandala-inspired geometric pattern centered on a stylized crescent moon and celestial elements. The pattern uses deep sapphire blue, radiant gold leaf accents, and rich indigo inks against a clean, solid off-white background. The design features intricate, symmetrical floral and stellar motifs (mandala style), highly contrasted for maximum pop. Clean, crisp lines, dotwork detail, luxury tattoo flash style, vector illustration quality, highly detailed, perfect for screen printing on fabric.
